actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: In life you're always surrounded by other players, all trying to reach the same goals.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: He's not playing by the rules.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Sometimes in life people win by not playing by the rules.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: We're going to have to forfeit.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: In life, sometimes you have to know when to forfeit.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: You have to be willing to take risks if you want to win.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: You have to be willing to take risks in life in order to get ahead.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: In life, you have to figure out the rules and live by them.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: I think I'm going to pass.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: You have to know when to play and when to pass in order to do well in life.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: I'm going to have to play this smart.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: To win in the game of life you to have to play it smart.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: I'm going to take my chances.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: You have to take some chances in life

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Life is all about taking chances and rolling the dice.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: You have to be playing to win every day.
